rdf:Description.dc:description: T5 bending-to-tilting transition in loose saturated sand (manuscript §4.1, @fig-t5-progression). Two stacked panels sharing an x-axis: (a) Normalised RMS tower displacement across Baseline, S/D = 0.19, 0.39, 0.58, Backfill; peak of 4.27× at S/D = 0.58 marks the abrupt mode shift from elastic bending to rigid-body tilting. (b) Bottom bending strain change (%) across the same stages; +20.9 % at 0.19, +14.3 % at 0.39, then a sign reversal to -10.8 % at 0.58 consistent with the tilting kinematic mode. After backfill, displacement sheds 67 % of its peak amplification and bottom strain returns to +2.9 %. Frequency alone declines only 2.58 % at S/D = 0.58 — the mode transition is invisible to frequency monitoring.
